CREATE TABLE test_strings (s1 VARCHAR, s2 VARCHAR);
SELECT jaro_similarity(s1, s2) AS similarity FROM test_strings;
SELECT s1, s2, jaro_similarity(s1, s2) AS similarity FROM test_strings WHERE similarity > 0.5;
SELECT AVG(jaro_similarity(s1, s2)) FROM (SELECT s1, s2 FROM test_strings WHERE LENGTH(s1) > 0 AND LENGTH(s2) > 0);
SELECT s1, s2, jaro_similarity(s1, s2) AS similarity FROM test_strings WHERE s1 != s2;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_strings WHERE jaro_similarity(s1, s2) = 1.0;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS non_similar_count FROM test_strings WHERE jaro_similarity(s1, s2) < 0.1;
SELECT DISTINCT jaro_similarity(s1, s2) AS unique_similarities FROM test_strings;
